summary: ESP8266 WiFi module controlled via UART AT commands. Supports station mode, AP mode, TCP/UDP client and server connections.
notes: ESP8266 operates at 3.3V logic but needs separate 3.3V supply (>300mA peak).
Default baud rate is 115200; change to 9600 with AT+UART_DEF=9600,8,1,0,0 for easier use.
RST and CH_PD pins should be pulled HIGH for normal operation.
AT firmware version must be >= 1.3 for reliable operation.
sources: Espressif ESP8266 AT Instruction Set documentation

app_logic_snippets.api_summary: ESP8266_Init() ESP8266_SendAT(cmd,resp,timeout_ms) ESP8266_ConnectWiFi(ssid,pwd) ESP8266_ConnectTCP(ip,port) ESP8266_Send(data,len) ESP8266_Read(buf,max) ESP8266_DataAvailable()
app_logic_snippets.notes: All AT commands use blocking send+wait pattern. Use ESP8266_SendAT() for raw AT commands. WiFi connection may take 5-10 seconds.
